docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, CESAR AS TO DEFENDANT JARRON, BRENT EDWIN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-26-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-25-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-06-1996
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, CESAR

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-26-1996, CONTINUED TO DEC-03-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR RESULTS OF ARBITRATION. IF DISMISSAL OR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD HAS NOT BEEN ENTERED, EACH PARTY IS ORDERED TO FILE A DECLARATION BY 11/16/96 STATING FACTS AS TO WHY NO DISMISSAL OR CONFIRMED ARBITRATION AWARD HAS BEEN FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY ADVINCULA, CENON S

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-03-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 301(C). HEARING SET FOR JAN-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-07-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-06-1997 CONTINUED FROM JAN-07-1997 TO FEB-06-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-06-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-06-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 3RD OSC FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE STATUS CONFERENCE TODAY, 2/6/97, AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. AND AS TO WHY THIS CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED; SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $50 BASED UPON PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR 2/6/97 TO BE PAID BY 3/10/97 AT 1:00 PM. HEARING SET FOR MAR-10-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
REPLY TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALES, CESAR
OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-10-1997, DISMISSAL FOR PLTF'S FAILURES TO APPEAR. FAILURES TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. DISMISSAL IS BASED ON CCP 525.5
